news.title:
Morgan Stanley upgrades Avenue Supermarts (DMart) to Overweight with a 14% upside, raising the target to Rs 5,188.
The upgrade cites DMart's robust growth, store expansion, cost efficiency, and value-led strategy amid consumption challenges.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley upgrades Avenue Supermarts (DMart) to Overweight with a 14% upside, raising the target to Rs 5,188.
The upgrade cites DMart's robust growth, store expansion, cost efficiency, and value-led strategy amid consumption challenges.

news.title:
CLSA rates Avenue Supermarts as high conviction outperform, target Rs 6,583.
Inflation near 3% aids pricing; company plans 58+ new stores, totaling 500.
news.summary:
CLSA rates Avenue Supermarts as high conviction outperform, target Rs 6,583.
Inflation near 3% aids pricing; company plans 58+ new stores, totaling 500.

news.title:
DMart shares surged 4% post a strong Q4 update.
JM Financial finds DMart's risk-reward ratio unattractive despite the rally.
news.summary:
DMart shares surged 4% post a strong Q4 update.
JM Financial finds DMart's risk-reward ratio unattractive despite the rally.

news.title: Avenue Supermarts' Q4 FY26 revenue from operations stood at ₹172.05 billion.
news.summary: Avenue Supermarts' Q4 FY26 revenue from operations stood at ₹172.05 billion.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts (D-Mart) reached 500 stores in FY26, adding 85 stores, its highest annual expansion. Shares surged over 8% on this milestone.
D-Mart faces competition from quick commerce and rivals like Reliance Retail and Tata's Trent but remains bullish on brick-and-mortar growth.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts (D-Mart) reached 500 stores in FY26, adding 85 stores, its highest annual expansion. Shares surged over 8% on this milestone.
D-Mart faces competition from quick commerce and rivals like Reliance Retail and Tata's Trent but remains bullish on brick-and-mortar growth.

news.title: Avenue Supermarts shares rose 7% following robust store expansion.
news.summary: Avenue Supermarts shares rose 7% following robust store expansion.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts had NSE block trade of 44,170 shares at Rs. 4246.4.
The total trade value amounted to approximately Rs. 18.76 crore.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts had NSE block trade of 44,170 shares at Rs. 4246.4.
The total trade value amounted to approximately Rs. 18.76 crore.

news.title: Morgan Stanley retains Equal Weight on Avenue Supermarts with a target of ₹4,552.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley retains Equal Weight on Avenue Supermarts with a target of ₹4,552.

news.title:
CLSA predicts a 60% rise in DMart parent company shares due to new store openings.
CLSA expresses strong confidence in DMart's growth prospects.
news.summary:
CLSA predicts a 60% rise in DMart parent company shares due to new store openings.
CLSA expresses strong confidence in DMart's growth prospects.

news.title:
CLSA maintains 'high conviction' on Avenue Supermarts with a target of ₹6,185, implying a 58.5% upside.
DMart opened 66 stores in FY, surpassing expectations; Q3 net profit rose 17% to ₹856 crore.
news.summary:
CLSA maintains 'high conviction' on Avenue Supermarts with a target of ₹6,185, implying a 58.5% upside.
DMart opened 66 stores in FY, surpassing expectations; Q3 net profit rose 17% to ₹856 crore.

news.title:
CLSA maintains High Conviction Outperform on Avenue Supermarts, sets target price at Rs 6,185.
Store expansion with 66 additions, 10% above expectations, boosts growth outlook.
news.summary:
CLSA maintains High Conviction Outperform on Avenue Supermarts, sets target price at Rs 6,185.
Store expansion with 66 additions, 10% above expectations, boosts growth outlook.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts opens 5 new stores, expanding in Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, and UP.
Total store count reaches 477, reflecting continued retail presence growth.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts opens 5 new stores, expanding in Tamil Nadu, Maharashtra, and UP.
Total store count reaches 477, reflecting continued retail presence growth.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts fully redeemed Rs. 200 Cr commercial paper due 24th Mar 2026.
No outstanding amount remains; redemption was due to maturity, no interest applicable.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts fully redeemed Rs. 200 Cr commercial paper due 24th Mar 2026.
No outstanding amount remains; redemption was due to maturity, no interest applicable.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts rose 3.2% on 18 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 3,902.9 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.8% and retail sector's 2.8% gains.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts rose 3.2% on 18 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 3,902.9 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.8% and retail sector's 2.8% gains.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Kalpana Unadkat as chairperson effective April 1, 2026, succeeding Chandrashekhar Bhave.
Unadkat's expertise in corporate governance and cross-border M&A aligns with DMart's growth and competitive focus.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Kalpana Unadkat as chairperson effective April 1, 2026, succeeding Chandrashekhar Bhave.
Unadkat's expertise in corporate governance and cross-border M&A aligns with DMart's growth and competitive focus.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Anshul Asawa as MD & CEO, Ramakant Baheti as CFO.
Ashu Gupta named Compliance Officer, event materiality effective April 2026.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Anshul Asawa as MD & CEO, Ramakant Baheti as CFO.
Ashu Gupta named Compliance Officer, event materiality effective April 2026.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts gains 4.74% over 3 sessions after launching 9 DMart stores.
Q3 FY26 net profit surged 18.3% to Rs 855.9 cr; revenue rose 13.3% YoY to Rs 18,100.9 cr.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts gains 4.74% over 3 sessions after launching 9 DMart stores.
Q3 FY26 net profit surged 18.3% to Rs 855.9 cr; revenue rose 13.3% YoY to Rs 18,100.9 cr.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts opened 8 new stores across 8 cities, raising total count to 461.
Expansion spans Gujarat, Goa, Punjab, Telangana, Karnataka, Haryana, MP, Uttarakhand.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts opened 8 new stores across 8 cities, raising total count to 461.
Expansion spans Gujarat, Goa, Punjab, Telangana, Karnataka, Haryana, MP, Uttarakhand.

news.title: HSBC downgrades Avenue Supermarts, setting target price at Rs 3500.
news.summary: HSBC downgrades Avenue Supermarts, setting target price at Rs 3500.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts opened 3 new stores on Feb 23, 2026, in Kota, Ghaziabad, and Greater Noida.
The total store count for Avenue Supermarts has now risen to 452.
news.summary:
